reviews.comment:
No es la primera vez que me pasa, (el invierno pasado también) no funciona la app que hace el 10% de infinia y no te avisan, hasta pareciera que se divierten los playeros con la situación.

(Translated by Google)
It's not the first time this has happened to me (it happened last winter too). The app that gives you the 10% discount on Infinia doesn't work and they don't warn you; it even seems like the beachgoers are amused by the situation.

reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia. No funcionaba los post. Nadie avisaba. Después de realizar una larga fila uno se enteraba de sus problemas. Mala atención en general.

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience. The phone booths weren't working. No one gave any warning. You only found out about their problems after waiting in a long line. Poor service overall.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeHQyRFVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Últimamente siempre tengo un inconveniente para cargar combustible en esta estación, olvídate para venir de día porque hay 6 surtidores y siempre usan 2 o a lo sumo 3 y los playeros nuevos se toman todo el tiempo de mundo, los he visto cargar y después de hacer la carga preguntar si quieren que le limpien los vidrios con una cola de autos de 30 metros. Si venís de madrugada o no tienen sistema, o no te pueden hacer factura, o no te pueden cobrar con la app y hacerte factura. Critica constructiva para el encargado, cón un poco de ganas podrían laburar con el ritmo de la de los pinos.  La ubicación ya la tienen, media pila muchachos.

(Translated by Google)
Lately, I've always had trouble getting gas at this station. Forget about coming during the day because there are six pumps, and they only ever use two or at most three. The new attendants take forever; I've seen them fill up and then, after filling up, ask if they want their windshields cleaned, with a line of cars stretching 30 meters. If you come in the early morning, either their system is down, they can't give you a receipt, or they can't process your payment through the app and issue a receipt. Constructive criticism for the manager: with a little effort, they could work as fast as the one at Los Pinos. They already have the location; get your act together, guys.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdk9HV1FnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
